title: Minimum Deletions to Make String Balanced
titleCn: 使字符串平衡的最少删除次数

testcases.input: s = "aababbab" Output: 2 Explanation: You can either: Delete the characters at 0-indexed positions 2 and 6 ("aababbab" -> "aaabbb"), or Delete the characters at 0-indexed positions 3 and 6 ("aababbab" -> "aabbbb").
testcases.expectedOutput: 2 Explanation: You can either: Delete the characters at 0-indexed positions 2 and 6 ("aababbab" -> "aaabbb"), or Delete the characters at 0-indexed positions 3 and 6 ("aababbab" -> "aabbbb").

testcases.input: s = "bbaaaaabb" Output: 2 Explanation: The only solution is to delete the first two characters.
testcases.expectedOutput: 2 Explanation: The only solution is to delete the first two characters.
